_comment: Single source of truth for the auto-generated portfolio + metrics block in README.md. Edit this file (and the generator), not the rendered README. Public-safe only: no secrets, private URLs, revenue, or internal strategy.

platform.summary: A standards-as-code engineering library plus an AI-agent orchestration layer that turns intent into reviewed, tested, deployed changes across every repo.

commands.name: ship
commands.does: release gate — version bump, build, test, deploy, auto-merge, doc-freshness check

commands.name: audit
commands.does: security, dependency, dead-code, a11y & perf sweep

commands.name: new-project
commands.does: scaffold a repo with standards, CI, secrets, and a context primer

commands.name: update-brain
commands.does: maintain the knowledge base — ingest sessions, prune, reconcile the task hub

commands.name: improve
commands.does: fold a sharper prompt back into the matching skill so it compounds

practices: Standards-as-code: one library, symlinked into every repo and every agent's context
Multi-agent workflows: fan-out implementation, adversarial review, verify before merge
Secrets from a single source (Doppler) — never committed, never printed
branch → PR → CI green → auto-merge → deploy, CLI-first to keep it cheap
Automated doc-freshness gates block a release on stale README / changelog / version

projects.name: ParentPod
projects.blurb: Coordination layer for co-parents and caregivers — one shared, real-time timeline for feeds, naps, meds, and handoffs, with role-scoped caregiver access.
highlights: Published on the App Store and Google Play; web on Vercel
Offline-first Capacitor app; Firestore security rules enforce multi-caregiver access server-side
Native in-app purchases via RevenueCat, with a live growth/analytics dashboard

projects.name: Longevity
projects.blurb: Recovery & wellness companion — habit streaks, daily check-ins, and relapse-prevention tooling, with money-saved and trigger-pattern views.
highlights: Next.js + Capacitor; accessible Radix UI; Sentry-instrumented
Firestore back end with hardened security headers and CSP

projects.name: RealInvestorX
projects.blurb: Real-estate deal-analysis workspace — underwrite, compare, and semantically search deals.
highlights: Turborepo monorepo — React client + Express API + shared packages
Supabase Postgres with pgvector for semantic deal search
Auth hardening in progress: HttpOnly-cookie session cutover off client-side token storage

projects.name: Apex
projects.blurb: Personal-finance tracker — import, categorize, and chart cash flow and net worth.
highlights: React + Vite SPA on Supabase (Postgres + row-level security)

projects.name: Compliance OS
projects.blurb: Controls & audit-evidence platform — map policies to controls to evidence, with review workflows and audit-ready exports.
highlights: Full-stack evidence management with rich-text authoring (TipTap)
Firebase back end; role-based review workflows

projects.name: Beyond Volatility
projects.blurb: Public hub and blog — the front door to the portfolio and long-form writing on energy, engineering, and building in the open.
highlights: Custom child theme; the canonical public index of every product
